caption: A video presentation features a slide titled "Gloucester Housing Authority Sheedy Building," accompanied by a rendering of a multi-story, salmon-colored apartment building with a dark roof and several windows. To the right of the image, three bullet points state: "Requested $86,000 in CPA to supplement state modernization formula funding ($196,000)", "Replaced 30+ year old roof", and "One unit shuttered and more were at risk". A small inset video in the upper right corner shows a person with dark hair wearing a dark top, though their actions remain minimal across the sequence. At the bottom of the screen, a yellow banner contains the word "Preservation" and a small "MHP" logo. The scene remains static across all frames, with the presentation slide and the person in the inset window appearing unchanged, indicating a pause or slow transition during the delivery of the information.
